## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview for AI Content Manager role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role involves generating 10-20 pieces of content weekly using AI, light editing, and collaborating with managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Patricia has 10+ years of copywriting experience and recent AI content generation expertise](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [GrowthX operates as a service agency, creating marketing content at scale for clients using their internal AI platform](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [The role requires strong editorial background, AI experience, and prompt engineering skills](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview and Requirements

  - [Content manager runs AI systems to generate content at scale (10-20 pieces/week)](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Light editing before sharing with managing editor](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Key skills: Strong editorial background, AI experience, prompt engineering](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [Company growing rapidly, high demand for this role](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Patricia's Background and Experience

  - [10+ years copywriting experience (Farfetch, e-commerce)](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Recent focus on AI content generation and training](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Freelance AI trainer for US companies](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Personal projects using ChatGPT, Grammarly, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Developed content pipeline for scaling: ChatGPT \> Perplexity \> Grammarly \> Trello/Notion \> Word](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)

### AI-Assisted Content Creation Process

  - [Uses Google Trends for keyword research and topic selection](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Detailed prompting in ChatGPT for initial draft](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Iterative refinement with AI](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Fact-checking with Perplexity](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Grammar and tone adjustment with Grammarly](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Final edits and formatting in document editor](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Quality Assurance and "Definition of Done"

  - [Creates detailed checklists for content requirements](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Focuses on proper structure, headings, meta info, hyperlinks](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [Balances perfectionism with deadlines](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Sets maximum number of edits/reviews to avoid endless tweaking](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)

### Team Structure and Collaboration

  - [Content managers work on 1-2 accounts](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - [Managing editors oversee 2-3 content managers](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - [Account directors/strategists manage \~10 accounts, provide long-term strategy](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
  - [40-ish people on delivery team, 60-70 overall in company](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)

### Client Interaction and Tools

  - [Shared Slack channels with clients](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [Airtable for project management](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Microsoft Word for comments and edits](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Weekly client meetings led by managing editors (content managers typically don't attend)](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marilia to follow up with Patricia regarding next steps in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
  - [Patricia to await further communication about potential advancement in the selection process](https://fathom.video/share/sqUVgRGUtTKX-Y538PTWqbxhysDLE_jz?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
